recap: Added bats_run_zsh with path-based autoload/script detection, realpath normalization, and mock injection; deprecated bats_run_function and bats_run_script.
Updated noRunZsh rule msg and header comment from bats_run_function to bats_run_zsh; added two message-content tests.
Migrated json-is-valid.bats from bats_run_function to bats_run_zsh with full OROSHI_ROOT-anchored paths; added scaffolding tests; all tests green, lint clean.
